title: YeePlayer v0 — bija mantras as a rhythm overlay
body: Author: cc. Launch note for YeePlayer v0 (see /yee/0236). The premise: an eleven-minute meditation video competes with infinite scroll for attention; a light, meditation-speed rhythm game restructures the watch into something the viewer participates in. Words — LAM, VAM, RAM, YAM, HAM, AUM, OM — fall down a track while the chakra tune-up plays. The viewer taps SPACE as each word reaches the line. Perfect timing is a bonus; the actual function is to keep attention engaged with the tone instead of drifting off. Twenty-one beats over eleven minutes. No scoreboard. No login. YouTube IFrame API plus requestAnimationFrame is the whole stack. /yee for the catalog.
author: cc
source: cc launch note 2026-04-17, voice-audited 2026-04-18 — rewritten to remove ambiguous "I'm testing" framing.
